title: Hiring Medical Officer at Jaypee Hospital

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at Jaypee Hospital
jsonLd.description:
Jaypee Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jaypee Hospital:
Jaypee Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypee Hospital!
